title: spofoh-modmische
description: Spofoh’s Modmische - The exact client mods I use for building, recording, voice chat, UI QoL, and performance.
body:
# Spofoh’s Modmische

The exact client mods I use for building, recording, voice chat, UI quality-of-life, and performance.

---

## 🎯 Overview

**Spofoh’s Modmische** - the easiest way for viewers to run the exact Minecraft client I use.

This pack is curated so my viewers can download and play with the same tools I use on stream or in videos.  
It contains the client-side mods I rely on for **schematics & building**, **HUD & inventory quality-of-life**, **voice and audio control**, **maps & zoom**, and **modern performance improvements**.  
The goal is simple: make it effortless for viewers to replicate my setup, collaborate on builds, or record content with the same client features I have.

---

## 🧰 What this pack adds

- A complete client-side toolset for building, recording and streaming: **Litematica**, **Freecam**, **MiniHUD**.  
- Inventory, chat and UI improvements: **ClientSort**, **Item Scroller**, **Mouse Tweaks**, **Shulker Box Tooltip**, **Recipe Commands** and more.  
- Maps & HUD features: **Xaero’s Minimap**, **Xaero’s World Map**, **Zoomify**, **Better Mount HUD**, **3d-Skin-Layers**.  
- Performance & rendering optimizations: **Sodium**, **Sodium Extra**, **Lithium**, **FerriteCore**, **Iris**, **More Culling**, **EntityCulling**.  
- Voice & audio utilities: **Simple Voice Chat**, **Sound Controller**.  

---

## 🌟 Why download it

- No hunting for each mod - this is the **exact client** I use on stream.  
- Cleaner HUD, better inventory workflows, and smoother FPS for recording and play.  
- Plug-and-play: designed for viewers to install quickly and match my setup.

---

## ⚠️ Important multiplayer note

This pack is **client-side only** but includes tools that some servers may disallow (for example **Litematica**, **Freecam**, **ClientSort**).  
**Always check a server’s rules before joining.**  
I’m **not responsible** for bans or disciplinary actions resulting from using client-side mods on servers that prohibit them.
